case_title: CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU VS. ESREF TEKER

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU AS TO DEFENDANT TEKER, ESREF D.B.A. WOVEN PLANET, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU AS TO DEFENDANT TEKER, ESREF D.B.A. WOVEN PLANET, LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,294.75 ACCRUED INTEREST, $370.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEKER, ESREF D.B.A. WOVEN PLANET, LLC $17,951.95 PRINCIPAL, $1,294.75 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,616.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU AS TO DEFENDANT TEKER, ESREF D.B.A. WOVEN PLANET, LLC OEX HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2016 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER FOR APPEARANCE AND EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ON OCT-12-2016 DISCHARGED PER LOCAL RULE 8.9(E) WITHOUT COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ESREF TEKER. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. (514)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND BOROUGH OF JUNEAU AS TO DEFENDANT TEKER, ESREF D.B.A. WOVEN PLANET, LLC
